title: KYC verification failed multiple times
text: Tried uploading my documents 5 times but KYC keeps failing. The app says document quality is poor but I'm using clear photos. Very frustrating experience.

title: KYC process is broken
text: Been stuck in KYC verification for 3 days now. The app crashes every time I try to upload my PAN card. Customer support is not responding.

title: Can't complete onboarding
text: The verification process keeps rejecting my valid documents. No clear explanation of what's wrong. Waste of time.

title: KYC took too long
text: Finally got verified after a week. The process should be faster. App interface during verification is confusing.

title: Document upload issues
text: App won't accept my Aadhaar card photos. Keeps saying invalid format even though it's JPG. Very annoying.

title: KYC verification stuck
text: Submitted documents 2 days ago, still showing 'under verification'. No updates or communication from the team.

title: Face verification not working
text: The face recognition step in KYC keeps failing. Camera works fine in other apps but not here. Please fix this.

title: Onboarding is confusing
text: Too many steps for KYC. The app doesn't explain what each document is for. New users will get confused.

title: KYC rejected without reason
text: My KYC was rejected but no specific reason given. Just says 'document verification failed'. How can I fix it?

title: Payment failed
text: My monthly SIP payment failed due to technical issues. Now I have to pay manually. This defeats the purpose of SIP.

title: Payment gateway problems
text: Tried to add money to wallet but payment keeps failing. Multiple payment methods tried, none work. App needs urgent fixes.

title: Auto-debit not working
text: Set up auto-debit for SIP but it's not working. Have to manually invest every month. Very inconvenient.

title: Payment delays
text: Payments take too long to process. Sometimes shows pending for hours before reflecting in the account.

title: Net banking issues
